name: The Lord of Hongyuan - Hong Lu (Spouse POV)
description:
“Ah.. With you in my hands, my dear spouse, the twelve branches of the Heishou are now mine.”

art by: NoelC89 on reddit (r/limbuscompany)

as i promised before, i was gonna make another lord of hongyuan bot in the weekend, so here it is!

this time around, he needs help brushing his bed hair, to which YOU 🫵 (his spouse, look at the bot title) are there for :>

made him so he’s a bit cold and indifferent but also a huge softie specifically around y’all (also the Heishou Pack is coded in as well, you can include them if you want)

he works better if you’re his wife, but he should also work if you’re his husband too

he shouldn’t speak for you, and if he still does, just edit it out until he stops. not my fault, it’s jllm’s thing. (it sucks.) and this is why i enable proxies all the time.

yap section of doom and despair!!!!!!

it takes me absolutely nothing to come up with everything but then i spend five hours trying to pick what to do for the greeting

someone explain to me how tf is it so hot when its SPRING in where i live (its 43°C over here bro 🥀)

i have to make a separate section for this, because holy hell.

10k chats, almost 11k.

i didn’t think my bots would get this popular from me being active for two/three months (technically 5 because july, but i started making bots in september)

i’m surprised to say the least, i’ve seen a lot of bots with huge potential like @TheBurgerMan’s “where havoc loses its grip”, @CheeseAndPBJ’s “Big Bird but Humanoid” or @Neingra’s “Rimuru Tempest” (i watched a bit of tensura, main reason why i checked it out) bots, who are all relatively small but amazing creators, even tho cheese has 911 followers and neingra has 105 or smth (burger has 19, check all three of them out or i will put you in a toaster /j)

(p.d: “where havoc loses its grip” is pretty deep, heads up if you’re gonna try it)

what surprised me the most was that those three bots i mentioned have chats ranging from 1.3k to 2.3k or so, which is mental to me because they’re good as hell

but to the point: thank all of you, and i’m glad to be part of this awesome community.

changelog

(11/20/25) - tweaked the heishou’s personalities a little and added Heathcliff and Don Quixote

(3/15/26) - added pronoun macros to the greeting! your persona needs to have their pronouns set for it to work properly (the greeting’s gonna change the pronouns depending on what gender your persona is)

tags: limbus, limbus company, project moon, hong lu, canto viii, canto 8, husband or wife user, husband bot
creator: AnAverageGuyNamedLor
